provenance.fetch_method: Browser network-response capture on 2026-07-15 after browser-header curl returned HTTP 403. Headless Google Chrome fetched the authoritative SSA URL; Fetch API arrayBuffer() exposed the content-decoded response body, which is committed here. The extractor verifies the committed body's sha256 before parsing.
provenance.table_of_record: Table VI.G8.- Operations of the Combined OASI and DI Trust Funds, in Current Dollars, Calendar Years 1970-2090 [In billions]
provenance.cell_binding: Intermediate: / 2014 / Assets at end of year
provenance.timing_note: The 2014 report predates December 31, 2014, so this is the report's intermediate-assumptions estimate. Actual end-of-2014 reserves first appear in the out-of-bound 2015 report and are intentionally not used.

build.reproducible: parsed deterministically from the committed, sha256-verified HTML response body; no network or wall-clock timestamp is used
